artifact_subject.declared_summary: A declared procedural artifact patch refreshes a documented escalation rotation against frozen v6.17-v6.20 lineage references only.

declared_patch.patch_summary: The declared procedure patch keeps its frozen prerequisite and transition references complete enough for receipt recording.

procedural_findings.finding_summary: The declared procedural change is recorded as a receipt subject against frozen lineage references only.
All declared frozen receipt references needed for this bounded procedural receipt are explicitly present.

artifact_subject.declared_summary: A declared skill patch summary keeps some frozen lineage references but leaves part of the receipt basis incomplete.

declared_patch.patch_summary: The declared skill patch summary is only partially receipted because one frozen reference remains undeclared.

procedural_findings.finding_summary: The declared skill patch change is recorded without attempting to execute or install the patch.
The declared lineage includes frozen authority drift and symbolic mapping references by receipt only.
One expected frozen receipt reference for the declared skill patch summary is not present in the compact fixture basis.
procedural_findings.gap_summary: A reviewer must determine whether the omitted frozen receipt reference is materially required.

procedural_findings.finding_summary: The declared skill patch summary does not include enough deterministic basis to reach a fully receipted outcome.
procedural_findings.gap_summary: The fixture records only partial declared patch evidence for the frozen lineage.

artifact_subject.declared_summary: A declared workflow instruction patch references frozen transition summaries but lacks enough bounded basis for full receipt confidence.

declared_patch.patch_summary: The declared workflow instruction patch remains insufficient-basis because the fixture cannot determine the needed procedure-only lineage completeness.

procedural_findings.finding_summary: The declared workflow instruction patch does not carry enough deterministic receipt evidence to move beyond an insufficient-basis outcome.
procedural_findings.gap_summary: The fixture cannot fully tie the declared workflow instruction summary to every frozen receipt basis that a reviewer may request.

procedural_findings.finding_summary: Any runtime execution implication is out of scope for this preview receipt boundary.
The preview receipt cannot deterministically resolve whether undeclared external workflow steps would be needed.
procedural_findings.gap_summary: External system behavior is outside the frozen fixture-backed receipt boundary.

artifact_subject.declared_summary: A declared tool usage instruction patch asks for behavior outside the procedural receipt boundary.

declared_patch.patch_summary: The declared tool usage instruction patch is out of scope because it requests permission-like and deployment-like outcomes that v6.21 does not provide.

procedural_findings.finding_summary: Any request to grant tool permissions is outside the procedural receipt boundary and is recorded only as out of scope.
Any requested workflow deployment behavior is outside the procedural receipt boundary.

artifact_subject.declared_summary: A declared documentation patch references frozen admissibility summaries but remains unknown because the declared summary leaves one procedural basis unresolved.

declared_patch.patch_summary: The declared documentation patch remains unknown because the compact fixture cannot deterministically resolve one unresolved declared basis.

procedural_findings.finding_summary: The declared documentation patch change is recorded as a bounded procedural receipt subject.
The compact fixture cannot deterministically determine whether the unresolved documentation basis should be treated as complete or incomplete.
procedural_findings.gap_summary: A human reviewer must decide whether the declared documentation basis is sufficient for a stronger receipt outcome.
